pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML appears in approximately 90% of Chief Medical Information Officer job postings. AI strategy and oversight central to modern CMIO postings.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI & ML is market-validated for Chief Medical Information Officer. Final decision: include.
